# Daily Report — 2026-06-15

## Task Completed
Added `get_change_approval` tool — fetches a single `sysapproval_approver` record by
its `sys_id` via `GET /api/now/table/sysapproval_approver/{sys_id}`.  Returns
normalised fields (`change_request`, `approver`, `state`, `comments`, `due_date`,
`created_on`, `updated_on`) using the shared `_format_approval` helper.  Includes a
404 guard (explicit status-code check) and an empty-result guard.  The tool is
registered in the `change_coordinator` and `full` packages (alongside
`list_change_approvals`).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1635 (12 new)
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing system-package advisories (setuptools, urllib3, wheel) — no issues in
servicenow-mcp code.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/change_tools.py` — added `GetChangeApprovalParams` model and `get_change_approval` function
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — exported `get_change_approval`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported and registered `get_change_approval`
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added `get_change_approval` to `change_coordinator` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_get_change_approval.py` — 12 new tests (happy path, 404 guard, network errors, param validation)

## Next Up
Add `approve_change_approval` tool (PATCH sysapproval_approver/{sys_id} state=approved with comments)
